# View Generation Reference

Complete reference for all Odoo XML views and menus generated by `create-odoo-module`.

---

## Generated Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `views/{snake_name}_views.xml` | All Odoo UI views (Search, Form, List, Kanban, Activity, Action) |
| `views/{snake_name}_menus.xml` | Top-level menu + sub-menus |
| `wizard/{snake_name}_wizard_views.xml` | Wizard form view (with `--with-wizard`) |
| `report/{snake_name}_report.xml` | Report action + binding (with `--with-reports`) |
| `report/{snake_name}_report_template.xml` | QWeb PDF template (with `--with-reports`) |

---

## Search View

Defined in `{snake_name}_views.xml`.

```xml
<record id="view_fleet_manager_search" model="ir.ui.view">
    <field name="name">fleet.manager.search</field>
    <field name="model">fleet.manager</field>
    <field name="arch" type="xml">
        <search string="Search Fleet Manager">
            ...
        </search>
    </field>
</record>
```

### Search fields

| Field | Filter domain |
|-------|--------------|
| `name` | `[('name', 'ilike', self)]` |
| `reference` | exact match |
| `user_id` | Many2one search |

### Built-in filters

| Filter name | Label | Domain |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| `filter_draft` | Draft | `[('state', '=', 'draft')]` |
| `filter_confirmed` | Confirmed | `[('state', '=', 'confirmed')]` |
| `filter_in_progress` | In Progress | `[('state', '=', 'in_progress')]` |
| `filter_done` | Done | `[('state', '=', 'done')]` |
| `filter_cancelled` | Cancelled | `[('state', '=', 'cancelled')]` |
| `filter_my` | My Records | `[('user_id', '=', uid)]` |
| `filter_today` | Starting Today | `[('date_start', '=', context_today()...)]` |
| `filter_archived` | Archived | `[('active', '=', False)]` |

### Group By options

| Group | Context key |
|-------|------------|
| Status | `group_by: state` |
| Responsible | `group_by: user_id` |
| Priority | `group_by: priority` |
| Start Date | `group_by: date_start:month` |

---

## Form View

```xml
<record id="view_fleet_manager_form" model="ir.ui.view">
    <field name="name">fleet.manager.form</field>
    <field name="model">fleet.manager</field>
    <field name="arch" type="xml">
        <form string="Fleet Manager">
            ...
        </form>
    </field>
</record>
```

### Header (statusbar + action buttons)

```xml
<header>
    <button name="action_confirm"     string="Confirm"      type="object"
            class="btn-primary"       invisible="state != 'draft'"/>
    <button name="action_start"       string="Start"        type="object"
            class="btn-primary"       invisible="state != 'confirmed'"/>
    <button name="action_done"        string="Mark as Done" type="object"
            class="btn-success"       invisible="state != 'in_progress'"/>
    <button name="action_cancel"      string="Cancel"       type="object"
            invisible="state in ('done','cancelled')"/>
    <button name="action_reset_draft" string="Reset to Draft" type="object"
            invisible="state != 'cancelled'"/>
    <field name="state" widget="statusbar"
           statusbar_visible="draft,confirmed,in_progress,done"/>
</header>
```

Each button is conditionally hidden via `invisible` — only the contextually valid button is shown.

### Sheet layout

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [Smart button box]          [Priority stars]  [Ribbon]   │
│                                                            │
│  ┌──────────────────────────┐  ┌─────────────────────────┐│
│  │ Name:       [input]      │  │ Responsible: [user]     ││
│  │ Reference:  [readonly]   │  │ Company:     [company]  ││
│  │ Description:[textarea]   │  │ Tags:        [m2m tags] ││
│  └──────────────────────────┘  └─────────────────────────┘│
│                                                            │
│  ┌───── Dates ─────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ Start Date: [date]    End Date: [date]               │  │
│  │ Duration:   [computed]                               │  │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│                                                            │
│  ══ Chatter ══════════════════════════════════════════════ │
│  [Activity buttons] [Message input] [Log note]             │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Ribbon widget

A `<div class="oe_ribbon">` with the text "Cancelled" appears when `state == 'cancelled'`.

### OWL component integration

When `--with-owl` is used, `static/src/js/{snake_name}.js` exports a `{Pascal}Widget` OWL
component registered under `registry.category("actions")`. Add it to the form view manually:

```xml
<widget name="fleet_manager_action_widget"/>
```

---

## List View

```xml
<record id="view_fleet_manager_list" model="ir.ui.view">
    <field name="name">fleet.manager.list</field>
    <field name="model">fleet.manager</field>
    <field name="arch" type="xml">
        <list string="Fleet Manager"
              decoration-danger="state == 'cancelled'"
              decoration-success="state == 'done'"
              decoration-warning="state == 'in_progress'">
            ...
        </list>
    </field>
</record>
```

### Columns

| Column | Widget | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| `priority` | `priority` | Star icons |
| `reference` | — | Auto-sequence code |
| `name` | — | Primary label |
| `state` | `badge` | Coloured badge |
| `user_id` | `many2one_avatar_user` | User avatar |
| `date_start` | — | Date |
| `date_end` | — | Date |
| `duration_days` | — | Computed integer |

### Row decorations

| Decoration | When applied |
|------------|-------------|
| `decoration-danger` (red) | `state == 'cancelled'` |
| `decoration-success` (green) | `state == 'done'` |
| `decoration-warning` (orange) | `state == 'in_progress'` |

### Inline action buttons

```xml
<button name="action_confirm" string="Confirm" type="object"
        icon="fa-check" invisible="state != 'draft'"/>
<button name="action_done"    string="Done"    type="object"
        icon="fa-flag" invisible="state != 'in_progress'"/>
```

---

## Kanban View

```xml
<record id="view_fleet_manager_kanban" model="ir.ui.view">
    <field name="name">fleet.manager.kanban</field>
    <field name="model">fleet.manager</field>
    <field name="arch" type="xml">
        <kanban default_group_by="state"
                class="o_kanban_small_column"
                quick_create="false">
            ...
        </kanban>
    </field>
</record>
```

### Card layout

```
┌─────────────────────────────────┐
│  [Reference]     [Priority ★]  │
│  [Name — bold]                  │
│  [State badge]  [Avatar user]   │
│  [date_start] → [date_end]      │
└─────────────────────────────────┘
```

Default group by: `state` (shows one column per state).

---

## Activity View

```xml
<record id="view_fleet_manager_activity" model="ir.ui.view">
    <field name="name">fleet.manager.activity</field>
    <field name="model">fleet.manager</field>
    <field name="arch" type="xml">
        <activity string="Fleet Manager">
            <field name="user_id"/>
            <templates>
                <div t-name="activity-box">
                    <img t-att-src="activity_image('res.users','image_128',record.user_id.raw_value)"
                         t-att-title="record.user_id.value"
                         t-att-alt="record.user_id.value"/>
                    <div class="activity-desc">
                        <field name="name"/>
                        <field name="state" widget="badge"/>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </templates>
        </activity>
    </field>
</record>
```

---

## Action Window

The `ir.actions.act_window` wires all views together:

```xml
<record id="action_fleet_manager" model="ir.actions.act_window">
    <field name="name">Fleet Manager</field>
    <field name="res_model">fleet.manager</field>
    <field name="view_mode">list,kanban,form,activity</field>
    <field name="search_view_id" ref="view_fleet_manager_search"/>
    <field name="context">{}</field>
    <field name="help" type="html">
        <p class="o_view_nocontent_smiling_face">
            Create your first Fleet Manager record
        </p>
        <p>Get started by clicking <b>New</b>.</p>
    </field>
</record>
```

---

## Menus (`{snake_name}_menus.xml`)

```xml
<!-- Top-level app menu -->
<menuitem id="menu_fleet_manager_root"
          name="Fleet Manager"
          action="action_fleet_manager"
          sequence="100"
          web_icon="fleet_manager,static/description/icon.png"/>

<!-- Sub-menu items -->
<menuitem id="menu_fleet_manager_main"
          name="Fleet Manager"
          parent="menu_fleet_manager_root"
          action="action_fleet_manager"
          sequence="10"/>

<menuitem id="menu_fleet_manager_config"
          name="Configuration"
          parent="menu_fleet_manager_root"
          sequence="90"/>
```

The `web_icon` attribute gives the app its own icon in the Odoo home screen.

---

## Wizard View (`wizard/{snake_name}_wizard_views.xml`)

Generated with `--with-wizard`:

```xml
<record id="view_fleet_manager_wizard_form" model="ir.ui.view">
    <field name="name">fleet.manager.wizard.form</field>
    <field name="model">fleet.manager.wizard</field>
    <field name="arch" type="xml">
        <form string="Fleet Manager — Bulk Action">
            <group>
                <field name="record_ids" widget="many2many_tags"/>
                <field name="action"/>
                <field name="note" placeholder="Optional reason..."/>
            </group>
            <footer>
                <button name="action_execute" string="Execute" type="object" class="btn-primary"/>
                <button string="Cancel" class="btn-secondary" special="cancel"/>
            </footer>
        </form>
    </field>
</record>
```

The wizard is bound to the list view via `binding_model_id` + `binding_view_types="list"` —
it appears in the **Action** dropdown on list selection.

---

## QWeb Report (`report/{snake_name}_report.xml`)

Generated with `--with-reports`:

```xml
<record id="action_report_fleet_manager" model="ir.actions.report">
    <field name="name">Fleet Manager Report</field>
    <field name="model">fleet.manager</field>
    <field name="report_type">qweb-pdf</field>
    <field name="report_name">fleet_manager.report_fleet_manager_template</field>
    <field name="print_report_name">'Fleet Manager - ' + object.name</field>
    <field name="binding_model_id" ref="fleet_manager.model_fleet_manager"/>
    <field name="binding_type">report</field>
    <field name="paperformat_id" ref="base.paperformat_euro"/>
</record>
```

The PDF template (`report/{snake_name}_report_template.xml`) produces a two-column header
(name + reference on left, state badge on right), description body, and responsible/period row.

---

## SCSS (`static/src/scss/{snake_name}.scss`)

Minimal generated SCSS skeleton:

```scss
.o_fleet_manager {
  // Module root class — applied to form views
  .o_field_widget {
    // Custom field styling
  }

  .o_statusbar_status {
    // Custom statusbar
  }
}
```

Add the module root class to form views:

```xml
<form string="Fleet Manager" class="o_fleet_manager">
```

---

## JavaScript / OWL (`static/src/js/{snake_name}.js`)

### Without `--with-owl` (default stub)

```js
/** @odoo-module **/
// FleetManager — static JS
console.log('[fleet_manager] module loaded');
```

### With `--with-owl`

A full OWL component that:
1. Uses `useService("orm")` to call `searchCount`
2. Stores reactive state with `useState`
3. Is registered as a client action via `registry.category("actions")`

```js
/** @odoo-module **/

import { Component, useState, onWillStart } from "@odoo/owl";
import { registry } from "@web/core/registry";
import { useService } from "@web/core/utils/hooks";

class FleetManagerWidget extends Component {
    static template = `
        <div class="fleet_manager-widget">
            <h3>{{ state.title }}</h3>
            <p>Records loaded: {{ state.count }}</p>
        </div>
    `;

    setup() {
        this.orm   = useService("orm");
        this.state = useState({ title: "Fleet Manager", count: 0 });

        onWillStart(async () => {
            const count = await this.orm.searchCount("fleet.manager", []);
            this.state.count = count;
        });
    }
}

registry.category("actions").add("fleet_manager_action_widget", FleetManagerWidget);
```

---

## Customising Views After Generation

### Add a new field to the form

```xml
<!-- In views/fleet_manager_views.xml, inside the <sheet> -->
<group string="Custom Info">
    <field name="vehicle_count"/>
    <field name="license_plate"/>
</group>
```

### Add a smart button

```xml
<div class="oe_button_box" name="button_box">
    <button type="object" class="oe_stat_button"
            name="action_view_related" icon="fa-car">
        <field name="vehicle_count" widget="statinfo" string="Vehicles"/>
    </button>
</div>
```

### Add a Many2many field with tags widget

```xml
<field name="tag_ids" widget="many2many_tags"
       options="{'color_field': 'color'}"/>
```

### Inherit and extend an existing view

```xml
<!-- In another module — extend fleet_manager's form -->
<record id="view_fleet_manager_form_inherit" model="ir.ui.view">
    <field name="name">fleet.manager.form.inherit.extension</field>
    <field name="model">fleet.manager</field>
    <field name="inherit_id" ref="fleet_manager.view_fleet_manager_form"/>
    <field name="arch" type="xml">
        <xpath expr="//field[@name='description']" position="after">
            <field name="my_custom_field"/>
        </xpath>
    </field>
</record>
```
